artifacts.contents:
openapi: 3.1.0
info:
  title: Support HTTP Service Contract
  version: v1
paths:
  /v1/tickets/{ticket_id}:
    get:
      operationId: getTicket
      x-lenso-idempotency: idempotent
      x-lenso-call-policy:
        maxAttempts: 2
        circuitBreaker: { failureThreshold: 2, openForMs: 1000, halfOpenMaxCalls: 1 }
        concurrency: { maxInFlight: 2 }
        overload: { maxInFlight: 2 }
        fallback:
          handler: support.cached_ticket
          on: [circuit_open, bulkhead_saturated, overload_rejected]
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Ticket
        '404':
          description: Standard not-found problem
          content:
            application/problem+json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/ErrorResponse'
    post:
      operationId: updateTicket
      x-lenso-idempotency: requires_key
      x-lenso-call-policy:
        maxAttempts: 2
        circuitBreaker: { failureThreshold: 2, openForMs: 1000, halfOpenMaxCalls: 1 }
        concurrency: { maxInFlight: 2 }
        overload: { maxInFlight: 2 }
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              type: object
              required: [title]
              properties:
                title: { type: string }
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Updated ticket
        '400':
          description: Standard validation problem
          content:
            application/problem+json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/ErrorResponse'
        '409':
          description: Standard conflict problem
          content:
            application/problem+json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/ErrorResponse'
components:
  schemas:
    ErrorResponse:
      type: object
      required: [type, title, status, detail, code, errors]
      properties:
        type: { type: string }
        title: { type: string }
        status: { type: integer, minimum: 100, maximum: 599 }
        detail: { type: string }
        code: { type: string }
        request_id: { type: [string, 'null'] }
        correlation_id: { type: [string, 'null'] }
        errors: { type: array, items: { type: object } }

approvalBoundaries.reason: Final ownership transfer and write reopening are irreversible without a separately reviewed reverse-migration plan.

expectedEvidence: Fresh input digests and a content-addressed Extraction Plan.
nextActions: Review the exact plan, diff, risks, and Approval Boundary.
prerequisites: The target Module is linked, ready, and owned by the pinned Host authority.
rollbackConditions: No mutation occurs; regenerate the plan if any pinned input changes.

expectedEvidence: A deterministic patch, file digests, compile evidence, and identity-preservation evidence.
intendedMutations: Write the candidate API, Worker, and Migration Workload scaffold plus generated bindings and clients.
nextActions: Apply the scaffold without changing linked authority.
prerequisites: The exact plan is fresh and the deterministic scaffold patch has been reviewed.
rollbackConditions: Remove only plan-owned generated files; refuse changed or unrecognized files.

expectedEvidence: Idempotent migration receipts and candidate health evidence.
intendedMutations: Create the isolated Service Store and apply expand-first destination schema changes.
nextActions: Verify destination schema compatibility before copying Service Data.
prerequisites: The candidate Migration Workload is valid and the destination Store is isolated.
rollbackConditions: Discard the candidate Store; never contract or delete source schema.

expectedEvidence: Durable source high-water marks, destination checkpoints, counts, and batch digests.
intendedMutations: Copy ordered idempotent batches through pinned trustworthy cursors and durable checkpoints.
nextActions: Resume only from validated checkpoints, then reconcile the copied state.
prerequisites: Destination expansion succeeded and every online table has a pinned trustworthy cursor.
rollbackConditions: Stop copying and retain the linked implementation as the sole authoritative writer.

expectedEvidence: Matching identities, counts, field digests, relationships, and declared business invariants.
nextActions: Record reconciliation evidence bound to the exact plan and checkpoint.
prerequisites: Backfill checkpoint and source high-water mark are stable.
rollbackConditions: Keep linked authority and remediate or repeat backfill when reconciliation differs.

expectedEvidence: Source quiescence, drained-work evidence, final checkpoint, and final reconciliation.
intendedMutations: Pause new Module mutations, drain requests, Inbox, Outbox, schedules, and Workflows, then copy the final delta.
nextActions: Proceed only while external authoritative mutations remain paused.
prerequisites: Candidate readiness and pre-pause reconciliation passed.
rollbackConditions: Reopen linked writes before provisional routing if drain or final reconciliation fails.

expectedEvidence: Candidate health, routing, compatibility, and provisional authority evidence.
intendedMutations: Route declared verification traffic to candidate Service `support-ticket-service` without admitting authoritative mutations.
nextActions: Run behavior, Contract, policy, health, and Runtime Story verification.
prerequisites: The source is quiescent, work is drained, and the final delta reconciles.
rollbackConditions: Restore linked routing and authority without reverse data movement.

expectedEvidence: Compatibility, policy, business scenario, durable state, Event, Workflow, and Runtime Story comparison evidence.
nextActions: Choose rollback on failure or request exact final commit approval on success.
prerequisites: Provisional routing is active and all external authoritative mutations remain paused.
rollbackConditions: Rollback provisional routing on any mismatch or stale input.

approvalBoundary.reason: Final ownership transfer and write reopening are irreversible without a separately reviewed reverse-migration plan.

expectedEvidence: Rollback evidence, or verified approval plus one-owner authority and topology evidence.
intendedMutations: Either restore linked routing and writes, or compare-and-set authority and topology to the candidate before reopening writes.
nextActions: Stop at the human Approval Boundary before final ownership transfer.
prerequisites: Verification is terminal, the plan is fresh, and the authority revision still matches.
rollbackConditions: Before commit, restore linked authority; after new Autonomous writes, block fast rollback without a reviewed reverse plan.

expectedEvidence: Terminal plan, phase receipts, evidence, authority, topology, rollback constraints, and next actions.
nextActions: Publish the versioned terminal extraction evidence for operators and automation.
prerequisites: Rollback or commit reached one unambiguous authoritative owner.
rollbackConditions: Do not erase source data, linked recovery state, or audit evidence.
